display.purpose: Hero headlines, section headings, product names. Always uppercase, always dominant.

script.purpose: Accent phrases, brand notes. Used once or twice per page maximum.

body.purpose: Descriptions, copy, navigation. Readable, no competing with display.

label.purpose: Badges, kickers, small UI text. Uppercase, bold, tight.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. White background, blue text, hard shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 18px; color: #004AAD; background: #FFFFFF; border: 3px solid #111111; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #111111; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translate(-2px, -2px); box-shadow: 6px 6px 0 #111111; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #111111; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 4px solid #FFFDE8; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Deep blue background, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 18px; color: #FFFFFF; background: #00357F; border: 3px solid #111111; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #111111; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translate(-2px, -2px); box-shadow: 6px 6px 0 #111111; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #111111; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 4px solid #FFFDE8; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Street Card
components.description: Standard container. White or blue background, black border, hard shadow.
components.html:
CARD TITLE

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-street-card { display: grid; gap: 16px; padding: 20px; color: #004AAD; background: #FFFFFF; border: 2px solid #111111; box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 #111111; } .ds-street-card.ds-blue { color: #FFFFFF; background: #004AAD; } .ds-display { font-family: 'Anton', Impact, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 36px; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0; }

components.name: Tab Button
components.description: Menu category selector. Full-width stack, Anton typography.
components.css: .ds-tab-button { min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #FFFFFF; background: #00357F; border: 2px solid #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #111111; font-family: 'Anton', Impact, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1; text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; } .ds-tab-button[aria-selected='true'] { color: #004AAD; background: #FFFFFF; border-color: #111111; } .ds-tab-button:focus-visible { outline: 4px solid #FFFDE8; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small label for product categories. Blue background, white text.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 5px 8px; color: #FFFFFF; background: #004AAD; border: 2px solid #111111; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Kicker Label
components.description: Section eyebrow. Uppercase, bold, pill-shaped border.
components.css: .ds-kicker { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 32px; padding: 6px 12px; border: 2px solid currentColor; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; }

narrative.overview: This system is built for a local coffee brand that doesn't apologize for being direct. Every visual choice reinforces the 'no soft drama' attitude — strong type, sharp contrasts, confident layout. The design feels rooted in its Indonesian context, not imported from a global template.
keyCharacteristics: Hard shadows and sharp edges — no soft blur, no rounded corners on cards
Bold uppercase display type in Anton — dominates every section
Blue-and-white palette with cream accents — simple, high-contrast, memorable
Street-level energy — feels like a hand-painted sign, not a corporate brand

rules.name: The Tight Palette Rule
rules.body: Five colors total. No sixth accent, no gradient, no tint. The constraint IS the identity.

rules.name: The Blue Dominance Rule
rules.body: Blue appears on 40-60% of any given screen. It's not an accent — it's the surface.

rules.name: The Anton Rule
rules.body: Anton is for headlines only. Never use it for body text, buttons, or labels. Its power comes from restraint.

rules.name: The One Script Rule
rules.body: Caveat appears once per section at most. Two script accents on the same screen kills the effect.

rules.name: The No Blur Rule
rules.body: Shadows never use blur radius. If it has blur, it's not KHA.

rules.name: The Offset Rule
rules.body: Shadow offset is always equal in X and Y (4px 4px, 5px 5px, 6px 6px). Uneven offsets feel accidental.

dos: Do use hard shadows with zero blur on every card and button.
Do keep the palette to five colors maximum.
Do use Anton for headlines and nothing else.
Do make borders visible (2px minimum) on all structural elements.
Do use uppercase for all display type and labels.
Do maintain the bold, direct voice in all copy.
donts: Don't use rounded corners on cards or sections. Sharp edges only. Pill shape is for badges and labels.
Don't add blur to shadows. No ambient glow, no soft elevation.
Don't introduce gradients. Flat color only.
Don't use muted grays or pastels. The palette is bold or it's nothing.
Don't make it mainstream. This already has 'bold' character — don't dilute it into safe/neutral territory.
Don't pair Anton with another condensed sans-serif. It stands alone.
Don't use Caveat more than once per section.
